scripts.backend: cd backend && python -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -e . && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.dev: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run dev -- -H 0.0.0.0
scripts.frontend: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run dev -- -H 0.0.0.0
